title: Slovakian Tagine with Xanthan Slurry
description: A twist on traditional tagine, this Slovakian-inspired dish incorporates xanthan gum for added depth, paired with a sweet dark soy sauce.
instructions: Heat infused oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onions and cook until translucent.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add carrots and potatoes. Cook for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix xanthan gum with 2 tablespoons of water to create a slurry.
Add xanthan slurry and dark soy sauce to the pan. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
